zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Baskerville於1435年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，她的父親John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville27歲，母親Cecily Deveraux19歲。她和Watkin Vaughn I至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1499年在英國賀福爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Baskerville于1435年出生在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，她的父亲John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville27岁，母亲Cecily Deveraux19岁。她和Watkin Vaughn I至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1499年在英国賀福爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Baskerville was born in 1435, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, her father, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, was 27 and her mother, Cecily Deveraux, was 19. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Watkin Vaughn I. She died in 1499, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Baskerville est née en 1435, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecily Deveraux, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Watkin Vaughn I. Elle est décédée en 1499, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Baskerville 1435 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville 27 und ihre Mutter Cecily Deveraux 19. Sie hatte mit Watkin Vaughn I mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Baskerville è nata il nel 1435 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Cecily Deveraux, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Watkin Vaughn I. Morì nel 1499, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Baskervilleが1435年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskervilleは27歳，母Cecily Deverauxは19歳であった。彼女はWatkin Vaughn Iとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1499年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Baskerville(이)가 1435년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Deveraux(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Watkin Vaughn I(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Baskerville nasceu em 1435, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Deveraux, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Watkin Vaughn I. Ela faleceu em 1499, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Baskerville родилась в 1435 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Deveraux, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Watkin Vaughn I. Она умерла в 1499 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl Baskerville nació en 1435, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Cecily Deveraux, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Watkin Vaughn I. Murió en 1499, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
